entry.title: Re: Rest service with body in form-data with key and value

I have tried the same but still having the 400 Bad request issue, can you help me with the code.

Regards,
Rahul.

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS CAPM debugging Uncaught Error Error: ENOSPC:...
entry.content: We need to add node_modules into watch exclude, this should resolve.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content:
Same in incognito, tried different browsers (edge, chrome and firefox). All the same there.
I am on US10 on a free plan.

Earlier today I tried exporting, deleting and importing it again. Without success.

I also tried Building it as a web application. The Build failed with this being the entire log

AB version: 3.17.0
COMMAND:

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

entry.title: IDOC Extension
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I have a requirement to create extension for SHPMNT05. I have created 2 segments header(4 fields) and item(1 field). . header is added to E1EDT20 and item added to E1EDL20. In FM IDOC_OUTPUT_SHPMNT, created an enhancement to fill the idoc structure for both header and item fields. when triggered from VT02N , only header fields are showing and item structure is blank. status code 26 & 29.

in log of status 26 showing error in program SAPLEDI1 in subroutine FA5_DOCUMENT_SYNTAX_CHECK.

need help on this issue. where am I going wrong. the enhancement in the FM is not getting triggered by breakpoint. only the above routine is triggered at breakpoint but not clear about what is causing issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now manager LDAP data synchronization issues
entry.content: Thanks Anton for the suggestion ,yes thats what we are thinking to do as the next step to avoid these failures.Appreciate your feedback.

entry.title: Re: Pricing in delivery note - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi 

According to the Help (link), the Delivery Note is not intended to show the pricing.

"Delivery notes describe the contents of a delivery. They include details such as addresses, business partners, products, dates, quantities and weights, and dangerous goods information. The system creates a delivery note at different times depending on the type of delivery. For outbound deliveries, it creates the note when you post goods issue."

Indeed, if you check the data source (in Adobe LiveCycle Designer) the pricing data is not available in the Delivery Note Data Source, nor is it extendable in the Custom Fields -> Data Source Extension app.

What are your options?

  1. Consider using a custom field to hold the pricing information for the item and use the custom field on the form. (populate the custom field in the BAdI (For example LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE)).
  2. Consider using another form like the Sales Order Confirmation or Pick List (The data source is extendable and has some limited pricing amount there in the data source extension part of the custom fields app).
  3. Make use of the BTP SAP Form Service by Adobe. This would be a side-by-side extensibility solution. There is a reference example on the extensibility explorer. In a nutshell, you could use the Event Mesh and react to one of the available Business Events (see the Business Accelerator hub), then use the public APIs to extract the desired information, then use the Form Service to generate the form .

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: I clicked on Yes before 30 count mark was crossed. Awaiting for the confirmation.

entry.title: Re: Get Data from https://smard.api.bund.dev/ not working (complete ABAP-Code is in post)

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)

entry.title: Re: Mannual Reservation workflows
entry.content:
Hi Prasenjit123 

Could you check if this answers your question:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/custom-flexible-workflow-for-reservation-in-s-4-public-cloud/qaq-p/14048493/comment-id/4211150#M4211150

If you do not find a standard flexible workflow in the system, you could consider the SAP BTP Workflow service.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/building-workflows-in-btp/qaq-p/12785175

 

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Entity Fields - Agent Performance Management
entry.content: Can we dynamically set fields to readonly based on the value selected in a prior field, which is a pick list?

entry.title: Unable to invoice SO line items
entry.content:
Hello All, good day.

We currently have issue on SO line items not being invoiced.

In the SO, the affected line items are currently set with rejection reason to avoid being processed and possibly the creation of a new PR/PO document.

The SO already was created with a PO document and this was processed by business. However in the PO document, the item was set with deletion flag which was a mistake. Customer shared they already processed the PO and would not want to create a new PO document for the affected SO items. Since it was not possible to reverse the deletion flag in the PO, they have done direct posting to invoice the PO document.

Now we are having issue on how to invoice the SO items.

Can anyone suggest/share idea if there is any way we can invoice the SO items without removing the rejection reason or creating new set of PR/PO documents?

Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: Hi @Fazu - Please check your inbox for a message.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of ap...
entry.content:
Hi Yuki,

Unfortunately, there was no image posted with your question. If you could update it, someone may be able to help you.

For your second question, in the Fiori App Library, you can filter on the capability to do adaptation:

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: ICMR How can we manage the CLEARING STATUS = 3 in the matching rules?
entry.content:
In the ICMR configuration in ACDOCA reconciliation, we need to manage the matching rules considering the transactions with clearing status = 3 and clearing date <= to the period selected in the ICMR reconciliation balance.

If in period 1, company A has an accrual vs B and B has an invoice vs A.

The matching works, because the rule matches the 2 transactions.

In period 2 company A closes the accrual with the invoice, but this transaction remains not matched, because it has been matched in the period 1 how can I manage this case?

Thanks a lot for any support

Chiara

 

f

entry.title: Maintain the Business Partner in multiple languages
entry.content:
Is it possible to maintain the business partner in multiple languages in the public cloud

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Maintain the Business Partner in multiple languages
entry.content:
Yes, It is possible to maintain business Partners in Multiple languages using International Address Versions.

Kindly use configuration activity Activate International Address Versions - Client-Specific - 103268

Follow below steps for configuring International Address Versions :

  1. Open 'Manage Your Solution' app.
  2. Navigate to 'Configure Your Solution'.
  3. Choose configuration activity Activate International Address Versions  Client-Specific - 103268
  4. Select configure 

Refer below documentation for more details - International Address Versions

entry.title: Difference between Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax APP and PDF page numbering
entry.content:
We have faced an issue on Create advance return on sales/purchase tax.

The number page is different between what we see on SAP and when we download it on PDF.

How is this possible?

Why on PDF we have more pages?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Create Advance Return on Sales/Pur...
entry.content:
The difference in the page numbers is expected and is not an error. The first page in the pdf has the details of the selection parameters and hence the additional page.

When the parameter 'Short Header Will Be Output' is selected, the page number printed in the pdf is consistent with what is expected by the authorities and a running number for page numbers is used for subsequent months.

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: replied . I have not received the confirmation yet !

entry.title: Unit of Measure in SAP EWM – Materials with ST instead of kg/g
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In ERP, we have some materials maintained with the base unit of measure kg or g. These are also transferred to EWM in kg/g.
However, in EWM, we need to work with ST (pieces) instead, as we count the number of pieces rather than the weight. And its for the warehouse easier to count the materials in pieces rather than the weight. 

Unfortunately, we cannot simply change the unit of measure in ERP to ST.

What are the best ways to handle this in EWM or ERP so that we can work with ST instead of kg/g in EWM?

Thank you for your help 🙂

entry.title: Re: The same functional and matrix manager responsibiliti...
entry.content:
Hi,

We have Direct Managers and Matrix Managers contributing to the performance forms.

Since there are many ways they split their responsibilities, we have made is very simple !

Both have almost the same rights:

  • both can create/comment/rate objectives
  • both can contribute do the Career discussion (it's a section)
  • only the direct manager can date competencies (because it is a drop down rating), but both can comment to the section
  • both can send for sign-off.

This seems to work well for us, and when people ask how they manage do split the tasks, I say that they managed to define this for the employee's tasks and supervision, so they should be able to align on the performance form. 

Hope it helps,

Kris.

entry.title: Re: Build and deploy a CAP Project Node.js API with a SAP Fiori Elements UI and a managed approuter
entry.content:
Want to build 25x faster?

Check this blog post out https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/a-25x-faster-mta-yaml-build-for-sap-cap-node-js-projects/ba-p/14044449

John

entry.title: Can we set mandatory for attachments
entry.content:
Can we make attachments(Files Section) mandatory on the detail screen?
Just to ensure a file is attached. Can we do it with Entity Edits?

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: received now . Thanks a ton !

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content:
You may be trying to do STO from Company USA1 to Company GBA1 --In this case-- On STO Header 

says Company GBA1 is receiving company --your receiving plant (Item level plant)-GBA1-- the STO Header will have company Code GBA1-- 

if your receiving plant is USA1-- then the Header Company Code will be USA1--you can use GBA1 for plant USA1 as plant USA1 belongs to Company code USA1.

entry.title: [EP1] Quality hold location VS Cycle counting
entry.content:
Hi Team.

First Time Question. New to the community and to SAP. I am happy to be here and hope to stay long enough to start helping others.
My company is having trouble with quality holds and cycle counting.
SITUATION: Currently we have our quality hold set up as a digital location. We run into issues because we don't have a physical location to match. We won't be able to get one either. We run into issues during cycle counting because we use a EP1>SQ01>ABAP report to see what inventory and quantity we have location to location. With this set up even if the physical location has inventory assigned to a quality location hold my report does not show it. Additionally, if I were to include our quality location in the report it would include all inventory in that location, and it could be any number of items located anywhere across the whole plant.
IDEAL SOLUTION: Is there a way to implement a quality hold [inventory will not be unrestricted] regardless of the assigned digital location for the inventory?__ I like to think [maybe incorrectly because I'm new] that I will be able to perform location movements [digitally] or to create my EP1>SQ01>ABAP report to see what inventory and quantity we have location to location. for every status of that inventory [unrestricted, quality, blocked...] maybe there is a checkbox somewhere "[X]-Quality Hold" or a transaction that changes the status of the inventory without moving it.

Thank you for the help in advance.

entry.title: Namespaces are not supported for this language version (failed BAS -> on-premise deployment)
entry.content:
We are unable to deploy UI apps within our partner namespace from Business Application Studio to on-premise S/4 HANA 2023 (FPS02) instance (ie. packages set to ABAP for Cloud Development). The resulting BAS deployment error is: "Namespaces are not supported for this language version".

 

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: cust.packandship
type: application
builder:
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**
  customTasks:
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        log: 5
        target:
          destination: ABC
          url: https://systemurl.local:443
          scp: false
        app:
          name: /CUST/UI_PACKSHIP
          package: /CUST/_UI_PACKSHIP
          transport: ABCK900xxxx
        exclude:
          - /test/

 

I have found that the deployment runs successfully if I direct the deployment to a tier 2 package set the Standard ABAP. Why are we limited to deploying partner namesapce UI components into Standard ABAP Tier 2 packages? This is counter productive towards the SAP's movement shift partner development towards Clean Core best practices.    

 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

entry.title: SAP Sustainability Control Tower: Q1 2025 Updates & Highlights
entry.content:
For Chief Sustainability Officers, the recent Omnibus updates to the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) ease immediate regulatory pressure and give organizations more time to adapt. Yet the core imperative remains unchanged: delivering measurable progress on sustainability goals, building resilience, and maintaining stakeholder trust.   

In today’s rapidly evolving regulatory landscape, organizations face mounting pressure to meet ambitious sustainability goals while managing cost, risk, and complexity across global operations. For CSOs, the mandate is clear: deliver measurable progress on sustainability goals, ensure compliance with evolving regulations, and embed sustainability across the enterprise. But fragmented data, limited visibility, and mounting disclosure demands make this easier said than done. SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) is purpose-built to support CSOs in leading with clarity and confidence—offering integrated intelligence across financial and non-financial performance, enabling comprehensive decision-making in real time, and driving an accelerated transition toward low-carbon, circular, and responsible business models.  

In this blog post, we’ll explore the latest Q1 2025 innovations in SCT—from new qualitative metrics and AI-driven report customization to expanded analytics and enhanced connectivity—designed to help sustainability leaders turn complexity into control and ambition into action. 

Qualitative Metrics Definition and Data Collection App 

You can create qualitative metrics and collect textual information for a selected time period according to the configured period granularity. The system supports defining narrative, semi-narrative, and Boolean reference types and mapping data points according to the disclosure requirements of the reporting standard version at the metric level. 

Afterward, you can use the new “Manage ESG Qualitative Data” App to collect data for qualitative metrics. By selecting the metric ID and report period, disclosure information relevant to a data point can be added for the period selected. 

 

Enhanced Metric Configuration  

New fields are added to the Metric Configuration to allow a more detailed configuration and reporting: "Reporting Standard Version", "Disclosure Requirement"," Disclosure References". Multiple selection of disclosure references is possible and the content for mapping to cover ESRS and EU Taxonomy is included. You can extend this content to add other standards. 

In Q1 2025, SCT introduces the ability to define custom metrics with up to five dimensions for deeper drill-down and analysis, improving extensibility and reducing the need to recreate metrics for each new dimension. This enhancement is supported by a new public Read OData API, enabling secure access to standard custom metrics data—including additional dimension breakdowns—without requiring recalculation outside of SCT. Customers can configure and maintain these metrics in the Manage Metrics app, which includes classification fields (such as Reporting Standard Version and Disclosure Reference) for better alignment with frameworks like European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) and EU Taxonomy. Once configured, these custom metrics can be consumed in the new Analyze ESG Data app, other SAC integrations, or third-party tools using the updated APIs. By streamlining metric definitions and exposing key metadata (for example, metric formulas, units of measure, and leading hierarchies), SCT empowers users to leverage more accurate and granular sustainability insights that support regulatory compliance and organizational reporting needs.  

 

Expanded SAC Live Connectivity Enhances ESG Reporting 

In November 2024, SCT expanded its SAC Live Connectivity feature to support all 12 Data Provider Interfaces (DPIs), significantly enhancing the integration between SAP Sustainability Control Tower and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Initially launched in Q2 2024 with support for GHG Emissions, this expansion now includes comprehensive connectivity for Emissions, Energy, Resource Use, Water, Waste, Land, People, Injury, Corruption Incidents, Prosperity, and General Measures. This development allows customers with SAC licenses to seamlessly access and visualize their sustainability data in real-time without the need for data replication. By exposing custom fields and enabling live connectivity across all DPIs, users can create dynamic and detailed dashboards tailored to their specific ESG reporting needs. Additionally, a new outbound API, SustainabilityCustomMetricsData, is now available in the Custom Metrics category on SAP Business Accelerator Hub, allowing users to retrieve data for standard custom metrics, including drill-down dimensions. This enhancement not only improves the flexibility and reach of sustainability reporting in alignment with ESRS but also streamlines the data integration process, empowering organizations to make more informed and timely decisions based on accurate and up-to-date ESG metrics.  

 

Instance-based Authorizations 

We’re excited to introduce instance-based authorizations in SAP Sustainability Control Tower, which enables administrators to restrict user access to specific sustainability metrics and measures. By leveraging SAP Cloud Identity Services, you can restrict visibility to particular business objects – such as metric actuals or measure actuals – and further narrow access by business location, legal entity, or organizational unit. This means each user only sees data relevant to them in apps like Manage ESG Data, Our Ambitions, the Emissions Dashboard, and the Analyze ESG Data app. Importantly, instance-based authorization augments rather than replaces existing SAP BTP roles and role collections, offering an additional layer of control for safeguarding sensitive ESG information. Getting started requires a subscription to SAP Cloud Identity Services, establishing trust, and then configuring or customizing authorization policies to align with your security and compliance needs. To learn more about these steps and see example policies, check out our updated documentation and discover how to determine who can view what within your sustainability landscape. 

 

Introducing the New Analyze ESG Data App 

As of February 2025, SCT has launched the Analyze ESG Data app, designed to replace the existing KPI tiles on the landing page and enhance how customers and partners interact with their ESG metrics. The new app provides robust filtering options, allowing users to select up to six time periods – by year, quarter, or month – and view their data in greater detail. Additionally, users can filter KPI tiles based on organizational hierarchies such as business location, reporting line, and legal entity. The app also offers flexible clustering and grouping of KPI tiles by subject matter (e.g., water, energy, waste), reporting frameworks (like ESRS or EU Taxonomy), through custom user-defined groups. Personalization features enable customers to save custom views with their chosen KPI tiles and apply authorization settings to ensure secure access. These updates aim to provide a more organized and tailored experience for tracking and managing ESG performance through the Analyze ESG Data app, now accessible in the SCT launchpad under the “Analytics and Steering” section. 

 

Customizable AI Templates 

In the Generate ESG Reports with AI app, you can now copy existing SAP-provided report templates and toggle individual sections on or off, as well as change the sectioning of the template structure. You can also see the status of an SAP-delivered template and get updates when available.  

 

Planned Features 

  • ESG reports with AI: You will be able to edit the generated content in-app before downloading the reports.  
  • Fiscal Period Support: You can soon integrate fiscal year and period configurations in S/4HANA Cloud into SAP Sustainability Control Tower. Integrations will allow you to upload data for the activated fiscal year variant and the defined fiscal periods. 
  • New supported languages: Italian and Turkish will be added to the supported languages at the end of Q1-2025. 

 

Additional Information 

 

For in-depth details on SAP Sustainability Control Tower, we recommend browsing the SAP Help Portal. For an overview of all new features and functions, check the What’s New section, which is updated with every new software release.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tracker: Tiles usage and User monitoring for SAP Fiori launchpad (Monitoring SAP Fiori Lau
entry.content:
@RaminS @kevindass @Mr-Musa Were you able to implement this for spaces / pages? It would be great if you can share the api for getting spaces pages logs.

Thanks,

RK

entry.title: Re: EOIO in SAP CI Using JMS - Exclusive Mode
entry.content: Sharing my 2 cents: have tried to implement this using XI sender adapter from an S4HANA system, with the iFlow pushing the message into JMS and then a JMS dispatcher pushing the message into target. Unfortunately, the XI sender adapter does not support EOIO, and the EOIO message fails in S4 itself before delivering to IS. So, while the solution given in the blog is brilliant, it may become limited in usage unless all other sender adapters used in conjunction with this solution supports EOIO.

entry.title: Re: INSERT FROM SELECT - The expression that contains "BU...
entry.content:
It's probably a generic warning requiring a pragma is all.  No way around probably. 
As a test I would remove "BUKRS" to see if you get a warning about the next field after "BUKRS"

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content:
Which company (and plant) is sender (supplier) and which one (and plant) is the customer ?

  • e.g. GBA1 to USA1 -> Header: plant AND company code are USA1 but vendor is GBA1

Is that the issue? Is there another way?

entry.title: Re: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed
entry.content: Read also Making ALV to react to Change data automatically

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract - long term paid invoices
entry.content:
Dear @gvictor,

Thank you very much for your very good input, this was quite helpfull!

However, I have spent considerable time since your comment implementing and testing several different solutions and always running into new issues. I will share my experience and issues, maybe you or someone else can help. As mentioned in my original post, the goal was to do bonus settlements after an invoice was paid. 

Business volumen selection
I have created a custom CDS view focused on the clearing date AUGDT like you recommended. One part of this was to copy and adapt the SAP Standard CDS view WB2_CDS_CHECK_FI_NOT_CLEARED. Now when we have a condition contract the valid start/end date will be used to find invoices with a clearing date within this range. This means we can issue bonus values to the supplier based on his payments and the value collection is independet of when the invoice was created. So far so good! 

Delta accruals (retroactively)
My first issue comes from the retroactive delta accruals. Since I am switching to a new business volume selection, I need to close the old open contracts and open new ones. When closing the old ones, they will reverse all open accruals which is fine I guess (or do it manually). But when I do the delta accruals booking for the new contract I get unexpected values. The system will only accrue the values of settled invoices with a clearing date within the contract start date and delta accruals date. Debugging has shown the system will collect the business volume more or less the same way as a partial settlement would do and then use pricing to calculate the missing accruals. Since my business volume selection is based on the clearing date, we will not get any open invoices.
This is an issue since we will be missing the accruals values from open invoices in financial accounting. 

Partial settlement accruals reversal
The set up accrues based on the Billing Date by setting the field COCO_DETERM_DATE to "2 - Billing Date (KOMK-FKDAT)" <- as recommended by gvictor. Therefore we will get entries into table WCOCOF with the correct values after an invoice is posted to financial accounting.

When doing a partial settlement, we get the business volume of all invoices cleared withing the partial settlement time frame. This is good. However, the accruals reversal uses the CDS view WB2_CDS_CCS_ACCRUALS_REVERSAL which essentiall uses WCOCOF table with some other dependencies. You can find this here:

Class CL_WB2_REBATE_SETTLEMENT
Method GET_ACCRUALS

This will only collect entries from WCOCOF with the correct status. Meaning any invoices not yet cleared will be ignored in WCOCOF. The accural reversal is therefore the corresponding invoices from the business volume selection. So far this works for the local financial department, but I don't believe it is the way CCM is meant to work. I would expect the System to reverse all accruals, and then re-post the "delta" for the open cases. Our logic here cannot do this since it doesn't recocgnise the difference between open invoice and cleared, it only detects cleared ones. 

Final settlement accrual reversal
When a period, e.g. 12 months, is over and we do a final settlement another problem appears. The final settlement will set the status of my "open" entries in WCOCOF (entries not yet cleared) to 4 and interpretes it as "finished/cancelled". 
This circles us back to our problem with the retroactive delta accruals. We cannot carry these WCOCOF entries into our next contract period.
Let's say the contract in question is open for many years and every year we do a final settlement. The next partial settlement afterwards has lost it's history of open invoice accruals and restarts the cycle of accruing based on the business volume selection. (I hope this makes sense). 

This is an obvious problem for the finance department since we will build up accruals for future payments and then randomly reverse them. While later still paying the amounts owed. 

 

In summary:

  • Business volume selection based on clearing date works
  • Delta accruals use the same business volume selection and will ignore historic accruals from open invoices
  • Partial settlements will only reverse the accruals of the cleared invoices and not do a cummulative behaviour
  • Final settlements will reverse open accruals and reset the WCOCOF status, effectively losing them for subsequent contracts

As flexible as CCM is, I don't see any other option than using ZCoding in the provided BADIs. If possible I want to avoid doing this. Maybe someone has a simple and brilliant idea to help me here.

Many thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Condition Contract - long term paid invoices
entry.content: Dear gvictor,

entry.title: Introducing the Revamped HTML Viewer in SAP GUI for Java 8.10
entry.content:
SAP GUI for Java 8.10 introduces several exciting features and updates. While the new Source Editor stands out as a major addition, another key improvement is the revamped HTML Viewer, which renders web content within SAP GUI. The new implementation provides significant enhancements in functionality, user experience, and integration, making it easier and more efficient for both developers and end-users to work with SAP GUI for Java.

Key Enhancements in the HTML Viewer:

  • Improved Browser Compatibility: The HTML control is now fully compatible with widely-used browsers such as Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge, thanks to the switch to Chromium. This improves the rendering of both SAP-generated and third-party web content.
  • Better Certificate Handling: The update simplifies certificate management, ensuring a more secure and seamless browsing experience.
  • Dark Mode Support: The HTML control can now adjust to dark mode, offering a modern, flexible appearance based on the content.
  • Enhanced Accessibility: With support for screen readers through the Chromium-based engine, the control now provides improved accessibility for visually impaired users.
  • Simplified Setup: By removing the need for OpenJFX, previously required for the WebKit-based component, the integration of SAP GUI for Java into ABAP Development Tools is now more straightforward.
  • Integrated PDF Viewer: The included PDF viewer offers new features like search functionality and clipboard support, which were absent in earlier versions of the HTML Viewer.
  • Developer Tools: A standout feature is the introduction of developer tools. This update allows developers to interact with and debug HTML content within SAP GUI for Java. These tools enable developers to inspect HTML content and diagnose issues, streamlining the development process.
  • Support for Local Printing: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 now supports local printing of HTML content, eliminating previous workarounds and making printing more easy.
  • Synchronized Appearance with Surrounding Elements: Visual consistency has been enhanced, ensuring that the HTML Viewer’s fonts, colors, and layout align with the SAP GUI’s overall aesthetic. This creates a smoother, more cohesive user experience.
  • Language Synchronization with SAP Logon: For global users, the language displayed in the HTML Viewer now automatically matches the language settings in SAP Logon improving localization.

     

    HTML Viewer with Developer Tools in transaction dbacockpit

 

Conclusion:

The new HTML Viewer in SAP GUI for Java 8.10 significantly improves compatibility, usability, accessibility, and developer support. This makes SAP GUI for Java a more powerful tool for users and developers.

entry.title: Re: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content:
Ah thanks, I hadn't heard of that before!
I'm trying it now, but for some reason the ID isn't being added to the screen table. Do you have any idea what could be the cause of that? Is there anything else that needs to be done, besides changing the parameter and setting the screen to invisible when the group1 has the value of the ID?

I do see that there are four groups in the SCREEN table, could it have to do anything with that?



PARAMETERS: p_host   TYPE char70 LOWER CASE MODIF ID sc1.

IF sy-tcode = 'TCODE'.
    LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(ls_screen2).
      CASE ls_screen2-group1.
        WHEN 'SC1'.
          screen-invisible = '1'.
        MODIFY SCREEN FROM ls_screen2.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF. "END CHANGE RA16012025

entry.title: Re: Unable to use string fields in cds value help
entry.content: I have another value help, which is also not exposed in the service definition which works. I followed this tutorial for creating VH: https://learning.sap.com/courses/developing-and-extending-sap-fiori-elements-apps/creating-an-object-page_LE_5aa3bad4-7bd3-4028-99f4-3f479889ece0

entry.title: Re: Email Notification template setting in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Daysy_Zhang

i believe KhaingZin was asking for a purchase requisition without approval process (or with automatica approval, as you prefer)

I am facing the same question. 

Best regards, 

Bruno

entry.title: Re: Alternative Movement Types for Asset Scrapping in SAP...
entry.content:
Sachin --551 is a standard movement to scrap any material out of SAP (Does not matter if it is an asset or normal material)--Now if there is a specific need to use a different movement type or different business need --you have few options 

1. If the Business to track Asset scrapping against different movement type --you can copy 551 and create 951 and use that to follow the same process- but if there is no such need you can keep using 551

2. If the business wants to use WBS element (WBS dedicated to scraping) to scrap then you can use 221 

3. if business want to use internal order then movement type is 261 or Cost center then 201 =

Again points 1, 2, and 3 are business-specific needs --from a best practice point of view, 551 is movement that should be used for scrapping.

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content: @WRoeckelein I'm not sure if this is the case for all EML statements, but I tried without wrapping them into an RFC-enabled FM and I did get the am sure that it did trigger a COMMIT in this case, I first tried without and I did get a BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT runtime error. I will keep bgPF in mind when I encounter an applicable situation though.

entry.title: Bapi for delivery split and batch change
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

Which bapi/fm i can use for delivery split and then batch change?

I've tried with 'bapi_outb_delivery_split_dec'

For split and 'ws_delivery_update' for batch change.

 

The problem i stuck is

1) There is a commit inside 'bapi_outb_delivery_split_dec' and i cannot rollback it.

2) 'bapi_outb_delivery_split_dec' doesn't delete null items and subitems.

3) i still not sure which exactly params i need to pass, to delete an item (10, 20, 30) and subitem (900000+) and tomake it work in 100% cases.

 

And it's still not good that if split makes good, but update not - i can't rollback the split.

I want to work it in one luw.

Which bapi/fm's i can use for it?

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi Sijin,

I tried it and it worked! I just added a simple local class with the IF_ABAP_PARALLEL interface, based on the sample code in the documentation of cl_abap_parallel, made some changes to align input and output signatures, copied the logic from my FM with some minor changes to align input and output. Then I used also some more logic from the same example of the documentation to call it and it works like a charm!
Thanks for the suggestion!

Kr,
Toon

entry.title: Re: Unit of Measure in SAP EWM – Materials with ST instea...
entry.content:
Did you maintain Conversion between KG and EA ?-- Also what is your preferred UoM under the storage view of the EWM product master? You can update it using MM02 under WM Execution view.

The preferred alternative unit of measure is the unit in which you usually handle a product in the warehouse.

entry.title: Re: Unit of Measure in SAP EWM – Materials with ST instea...
entry.content: In ERP, we have materials where the base unit of measure is g (grams), but we have also defined an alternative unit of measure in ST (pieces) with the correct conversion (e.g., 1 g = 1 ST). In EWM, we would like to use ST as the preferred unit for picking, but currently, the system still suggests picking in g, which is not practical for our warehouse operations. The stock in the warehouse monitor is maintained for base unit in g, but we have the alternative unit in ST available. When I create the warehouse task it still prefers the gram-base unit and not ST as I entered it in the master data in EWM for the Warehouse Data..

entry.title: Functional area derived from cost center category?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I hope you're doing well.

I’m currently in the process of migrating cost centers to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I have a question regarding the Functional Area field in the migration template. Since functional areas are already derived from cost center categories, what is the purpose of specifying them separately in the template?

First picture: CBC activity Define Cost Center Categories

Second picture: Cost Center Migration template - cost center categories

Third picture: Cost Center Migration Template - Functional areas

Thank you for your help in advance!

entry.title: Copy fields from equipment to work order
entry.content:
Need to know if we have selection on copy field values from technical object equipment/ Functional location to internal work order when create work order with respect to equipment/ Functional location.
We have specific requirement to not copy WBS element value from functional location/Equipment while creating work order.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Copy fields from equipment to work order
entry.content: Enhancement IWO10010 / EXIT_SAPLCOIH_010 is usually used to set a WBS element on the order. You could use this to clear the value being adapted from the technical object. Leave it empty or set a value based on your custom logic.

entry.title: SAP Ariba- Supplier Partially Rejects Order, but Items Still in "Receiving"
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Scenario: We have an order for Item A, 5 units, and Item B, 5 units. The Supplier sends an Order Confirmation where Item A is confirmed and Item B is rejected due to not being available. 

The store/casual user then receives Item A upon delivery and does not receive Item B as it is not delivered. However, the PO is now in Receiving status.

The casual user is not familiar enough with the system to navigate to the Order Confirmation and approve the change order, not to mention some suppliers do not support change orders and submitting it will cause an issue when invoices come into the system. 

How are other companies handling POs remaining in receiving status, even though a rejection was given by the Supplier for the remaining items?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Data Flow fails
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am trying to load a local table in SAP datasphere using a Data Flow. The point is to use a graphical view as a source and load the result in the local table for improvement performance in the final report. The graphical view consists of 2 local tables joined together and a calculation step where I calculate 6 columns. All good so far, the result of the join returns something about 4.3M records (records which are available in the data preview and I can see them pretty quick), however the data flow stops with the error "<General error;129 transaction rolled back by an internal error: Allocation failed; Reason: configured statement memory limit from global configuration reached (SAP Note 3191224)>".

 

Please help me understand what is the issue and what can be done to avoid getting this error.

 

Thank you and regards,

Florin

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content: Hi Jagdeep, Thanks for the quick response. We do only Service PO's, Is STO will work for Services? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: OAuth request is failing in CPI using standard integr...
entry.content:
Ushhh.... looks like you try to cover multiple errors in one thread. But let's address one by one. 

  • Missing Grant Type: Ensure that your OAuth token request includes the grant_type parameter with the appropriate value. For instance, when using the client credentials grant type, your request body should contain grant_type=client_credentials.​ I can recommend following SAP Knowledge Base article: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3142922?utm_source=chatgpt.com
  • Error while reading from closed stream: This error typically occurs when the input stream has been consumed or closed before it can be read, often due to previous errors in the integration flow. I would check the steps in your CPI integration flow. Typically there lies an error - you can start by implementing proper error handling.
  • Invalid Client Credentials: Please check the client ID and client secret configured in CPI and see if it matches those defined in SAP Commerce Cloud. Follow these steps:
    1) Confirm that the client ID and client secret configured in CPI match those defined in SAP Commerce Cloud.
    2) If not already done, set up an OAuth client in SAP Commerce Cloud.     Ensure there is no typo... Further more, consult the configuration steps to define the OAuth Client outlined in SAP help: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/aa417173fe4a4ba5a473c93eb730a417/627c92db29ce4fce8b01ffbe478a8b3b.html?utm_source=chatgpt.com

I hope it helps!

entry.title: Can Ariba send POs to Non-enabled suppliers via Email without enabling them
entry.content:
In Ariba Buying and Invoicing we would like to send Non-enabled suppliers POs online via the email in their supplier location, with the Preferred Ordering Method set as "Email", but we don't expect to quick enable them via the PO. We have turned off the "Allow Quick Enablement" option in the AN rule so suppliers will not be quick enabled via the PO email. The PO is failing to send to suppliers since we turned this option off. 

Our question is, does Ariba mandate to quick enable the supplier in order to send POs via email to them? Is it possible not to enable them but still being able to send POs via email to them on SAP Business Network? 

Thanks for your comments in advance.

entry.title: B/S Reclassification starts to use reversal posting logic from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP S/4HANA Cloud offers numerous enhancements and new features to optimize business processes. One of the latest updates in 2502 release includes B/S Reclassification which streamlines the period end closing. This blog will guide you through the steps to set up and utilize B/S Reclassification with reversal posting logic in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

If you are already using the Post B/S Reclassification job in the Schedule General Ledger Jobs app, That means you have already postings in the system.

You can follow the steps below

  1. Logon to your system as a business configuration expert.
  2. Search for the Schedule Accounting Data Changes app.
  3. In the app, carry out the Migrate B/S Reclassification Postings to Reversal Logic job as Test Run.
  4. Check the results list.
  5. If the results of the test run are correct, carry out Migrate B/S Reclassification Postings to Reversal Logic as Update Run.
  6. In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Activate Features (ID: 106573).
  7. Use the search function in the activity to find the feature Use Reversal Posting Logic for B/S Reclassification (FINS_FI_CLS_REC_REVERSAL).
  8. Activate the feature.

If you did not use the Post B/S Reclassification job in the Schedule General Ledger Jobs app, That means you did not have corresponding postings in the system. Then follow the steps below to activate new reversal logic.

  1. In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Activate Features (ID: 106573).
  1. Use the search function in the activity to find the feature Use Reversal Posting Logic for B/S Reclassification (FINS_FI_CLS_REC_REVERSAL).
  2. Activate the feature.

As soon as you have activated the feature Use Reversal Posting Logic for B/S Reclassification (FINS_FI_CLS_REC_REVERSAL) you cannot deactivate it.

As of SAP S/4CE 2602 the reversal posting logic in Post B/S Reclassification is the default setting. You can no longer use delta logic. You must migrate your data before you continue using Post B/S Reclassification.

Prerequisite

If you did not use advanced valuation either, you must follow the steps to activate it beforehand.

Scenario

Details for migration steps

Download the excel for migration result, let’s take customer S10100870 as example

Group ID is a combination of reconciliation account/customer/assignment, it grouped the original journal entries posted with delta logic which can be found in app Display Line Items in General Ledger. And the migration job template will reverse the total delta amount posted in every month by Group ID.

Use proper filters displayed in the screenshot below, reversal journal entries from a migration job have been posted according to original journal entries.  

If the total amount is zero, it will not post reversal journal entries.

Conclusion

Customers can benefit from reversal logic to fulfill their business requirement.

entry.title: Re: Issue in BUoM in SAP EWM
entry.content: ok what is the solution? the link does not work 😞

entry.title: Re: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content:
I tried your code, and it worked with few changes:

PARAMETERS: p_host TYPE char70 LOWER CASE MODIF ID sc1.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  IF sy-tcode = 'SE38'.
    LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(ls_screen2).
      CASE ls_screen2-group1.
        WHEN 'SC1'.
          ls_screen2-active = '0'.
          MODIFY SCREEN FROM ls_screen2.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content: STO means you are purchasing stock material from the other company --What is business use case of services from the other company? it may work as ideally --GBA1 or USA1 are vendors to each other --you have to test the end-to-end scenario as in this case there will be no delivery involved.

entry.title: Re: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business par...
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Is it correct, that I have two Directories in which I need to customize SAP? First is "Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner" and Second is "Yard Logistics" folder. -> Yes

How do I know which number range is used by my BP Role? Do i need to define the number range here as "External"?  Do I need to define a new number range? How is the connection between this business partner role  and the number range? -> System is bydefault picking external Standard Group and check the number- Below is my system set up, My default role for driver (TM0001) automatic assigned to below external Standard Group. 

Than go to the Yard Logistics Folder:

Do I need to define this number as external? -> No, its internal only

And do i need to add the "D" here? -> No- System will add as D

Please let us know if any further questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Custom Control in Page Variant (Fiori Elements)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an old freestyle UI5 app that I am trying to convert to a Fiori Elements - List/Object Page (oData v4) app. The app contains a filter bar and a custom UI5 control that shows the data retrieved from backend. I managed to re-implement this setup in Fiori elements using the method described here.

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/customElements/CustomView/customViewInLRContent

So my Fiori Elements app has two views below the filter bar: a table view and a view with my custom control. Users can change the settings of the custom control. Up to this point, this all works.

My struggle is that I want the configuration of my custom control to be part of the page variant. When user changes the settings, I should be able to flag the page variant as modified. When a page variant is saved, my control should provide a JSON payload that gets saved as part of the page variant. When page variant is applied, a method of my control should be called so the control can be adjusted. 

As I mentioned, I have this in the first version of the app that uses sap.ui.comp controls. The trick that I am using there is that I store my control settings in the variant for the smart filter bar and I can simply call method currentVariantSetModified of the smart variant management control. This has been working for some time.

Sadly, I can't reproduce this approach as the controls used in the Fiori Elements are different (not sap.ui.comp) and I can't find suitable methods/events.

I made the control configuration to be part of the app state but this does not seem to be related to variant management. As far as I understand, the app state is only used during navigation. I also looked at sap.m.p13n.Engine but the dialog panels provided by this control do not fit my configuration settings. 

I can see that if I get a reference to page variant management via ID, I get object of type sap.ui.fl.variants.VariantManagement. I can see that it has a private aggregation that contains the standard smart variant. So that would give me access to setModified method. but this is really hacky and I still don't know where to store my configuration.

Is there an easy way to include own UI control settings into the page variant? Any guidenance in this area will be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content: This cannot be correct, in the PO header the plant and the CC must belong to the same entity, and a plant of the other CC can be the supplier, as would an external BP. Could you reformulate it?

entry.title: Re: Use Change Audit Reports

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across...
entry.content: Thanks Raymond, I'm referring scope item 2R3.

entry.title: Re: EWM RF Pick point HU maintenance -> HU return transfer
entry.content:
In order to resolve above described issue in RF reason is that source HU contains external step because picking warehouse task determined storage process and step. Its sufficient if external step is maintained only in pick point work center to move pick HU to destination after picking completion. After that source HU can be scanned with RF HU maintenance transaction and press F2 button CL/BCK sends back HU to warehouse.

Understand SAP EWM Pick Points

entry.title: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam attempt from India.
entry.content: Hello, Unable to purchase SAP certification exam attempt from India. The page will directed to leaning Hub portal and due to that unable to schedule the certification exam.

entry.title: Create a Development Project in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi All

I am not able to follow the below steps BTP cockpit trial account.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-mission-trial-8.html

Step 6: Modify the hdbgrants file

In File explorer, open the .hdbgrants file with the option Open With … Text Editor. Here, you can see a template of all different types of privileges you could grant to different user groups. There is a dedicated section for object owner users and application users.

For the purposes of this tutorial, we would like to grant the roles we have previously created to object owners and application users. The object owner will be assigned the role genericRoleForOO and the application user the role genericRoleForAP.

To do so, replace the contents of the hdbgrants file with the following:

I dont see JSON file. For

{
"MyUPS": {
"object_owner": {
"global_roles": [
{
"roles": ["genericRoleForOO"]
}
]
},
"application_user": {
"global_roles": [
{
"roles": ["genericRoleForAP"]
}
]
}
}
}

Please share navigation or more details on how to update the hdbgrants file.

entry.title: Re: Grouping Key not found in BP vendor company view (S4)
entry.content: Hello! I have the same issue. Did you find a solution on this? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: EOIO in SAP CI Using JMS - Exclusive Mode
entry.content:
EOIO with XI sender adapter is actually supported selecting handled by integration flow delivery assurance, in the integration flow you can then check the quality of service based on the header SapQualityOfService and route the message accordingly either to an exclusive queue or a non-exclusive queue.

We plan to publish a couple of design guidelines covering EOIO, here you can already take a first glimpse of the flow.

Alex

entry.title: Re: ¡Gracias Sandra Solís por inspirar a nuestra comunidad SAP!
entry.content: ¡Mil gracias por la invitación @Zamichiei!!! 💙 La pasé increíble durante el live, me encantó compartir y aprender juntos. Gracias a todos por tomarse un rato para vernos y ser parte de este espacio 🙌.

com.sap.engine.interfaces.connector.ManagedConnectionFactoryActivation

entry.title: financial statement version not updated from changes in global hierarchies

The problem is that all changes applied to global hierarchies are not replicated in the financial statement version. That means reporting financial statement versions in sapgui becomes obsolete. Is there a way to update the FSV hierarchy?

thank you!!

entry.title: Re: INSERT FROM SELECT - The expression that contains "BU...
entry.content: Yes, warning for all key fields.

entry.title: Set SOAP Header to fix "PayLoad elements cannot fit with the message parts of the BindingOperation"
entry.content:
Welcome to my first blog post! This guide is designed especially for beginners who are new to SOAP services in SAP CPI.

When an external SOAP service is called via SOAP UI with proper request payload, we get expected response, but when we use the same request payload to call the same Service via SAP CPI, we may get the below error due to in-proper SOAP Header

java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: The PayLoad elements cannot fit with the message parts of the BindingOperation.

By Following the steps, we can set the SOAP header in CPI to resolve this issue.

 

First of all, for the basic information, a SOAP message consists of the following parts:

Envelope: The root element of the SOAP message it encloses all the other elements.

Header:  It will be the first child element of the Envelop element. it can contain metadata with authentication or other pivotal details.

Body: It's a mandatory part and it contains the actual data.

 

Consider the below request payload which is success in SOAP UI:

 

However, when the same request structure is sent via SAP CPI,  follow the below steps to Set SOAP Header:

1. Reconstruct the above message by removing the header, envelope parts and by adding proper namespace to each elements. example:

<com:find xmlns:com="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws">
  <typ:repositoryId xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">Dummy
  </typ:repositoryId>
  <typ:statement xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">'06BA64C'
  </typ:statement>
  <typ:allVersions xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">false
  </typ:allVersions>
</com:find>

This is passed as the body via CPI's content modifier.

2. Set the SOAP Header using the groovy script below:

NB: Modify the script according to the structure.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import javax.xml.namespace.QName
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.SoapHeader
def Message processData(Message message) {
   // Define the namespace details
   def namespacePrefix = "typ"
   def namespaceURI = "http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types"
   // Construct the SOAP Header XML with explicit prefix and namespace
   def xml = """<${namespacePrefix}:userName xmlns:${namespacePrefix}="${namespaceURI}">USER</${namespacePrefix}:userName>"""
   // Create SOAP header entry with proper QName
   def header = new SoapHeader(new QName(namespaceURI, "userName", namespacePrefix), xml, false, "")
   def headers = [header]
   // Set the headers in the message
   message.setSoapHeaders(headers)
   return message
}

This script will set the  SOAP Header part in below structure:

<soap:Envelope
	xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
	<soap:Header>
		<typ:userName
			xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">USER
		</typ:userName>
	</soap:Header>
	<soap:Body></soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

And CPI will sent  below consolidated SOAP request message to Server:

<soap:Envelope
	xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
	<soap:Header>
		<typ:userName
			xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">USER
		</typ:userName>
	</soap:Header>
	<soap:Body>
		<com:find
			xmlns:com="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws">
			<typ:repositoryId
				xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">Dummy
			</typ:repositoryId>
			<typ:statement
				xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">'06BA64C'
			</typ:statement>
			<typ:allVersions
				xmlns:typ="http://com.rho.rcf.ged.ws/types">false
			</typ:allVersions>
		</com:find>
	</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

Refer the below SAP Help document for more on the SOAP header modifying: Help Document

entry.title: Condition contract management conditions RES1 vs REA1
entry.content:
Hello,

When reading about the difference between RES1 and REA1, I read that:

"Condition type RES1 Rebate:

You use this condition type RES1 in a condition contract to maintain rebate conditions in the sales rebate scenarios

Condition type REA1 Rebate Accruals:

You use this condition type REA1 in a condition contract to maintain accruals conditions in the sales rebate scenarios."

What is the difference between rebate and accruals?

Is the rebate referring maybe to the time before CCM and it is the same as discounts being part of the sales order pricing procedure or something else, but in CCM maybe not visible there anymore or how is it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Group Report Doesn't Read Doc Type EE
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

Due to legal obligations, financial companies in Brazil must execute a half-yearly closing of income and expense accounts. We have created a doc type to execute this routine called "EE". Although, group report isn't reading this doc type, so we import a CSV file with manual posting (11) to execute the routine.

My question is: why Group Report isn't bringing releases with doc type EE? Is there anything I can do to solve this?

Greetings from Brazil!

entry.title: Re: Transforming Classic ABAP to ABAP Cloud: From Background Jobs to Application Jobs
entry.content:
Hi @nikita_tabakov 

The very important and missing feature is the report output which is missing currently. 
Imagine a case in which 200 documents were identified based the selection parameters but only 140 documents successfully processed. So, we need to show log in the tabular form with few columns but just not the status message (application log which is not fit for this case).

Do you have any news for the same?

Best wishes,

Ramjee Korada

entry.title: #COE#BA01 One-time IBAN for Suppliers
entry.content:
Hello,

We're starting to see a few of our suppliers provide a different IBAN with almost every invoice (effectively a one-time or disposable IBAN), what is the best way to setup the system to address this in S/4HANA Public Cloud? Is a one-time supplier the best way to accommodate this, or is it more effective to keep the existing supplier setup and continue a manual payment? How are other S/4HC teams handling this?

Best,

Ryan

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
UI GENERATION

In SBPA to create forms and tasks with much less effort and much faster

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: OData Connector for PowerBi
entry.content:
Hi @olaf_fischer / @gustavokath ,

I hope you're doing well.

Everything was working fine earlier, and all setup activities were completed correctly. However, recently, while trying to log in via the custom connector, I started receiving the following error:

🚨 Error Message:
"We're unable to connect. Please delete your credentials and try again later."

 

 

 

I have already attempted several resolutions, including modifying certain properties, but none have been successful.

Could you please assist in identifying the root cause and providing a resolution? Your support would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,
Shelendra Gupta

entry.title: Re: Unable to use string fields in cds value help
entry.content: there is no magic, when you check metadata, are sure that valuehelp(you said not exposed) is not presented?

entry.title: Condition contract management overwrite the accrual amounts with a fixed sum
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible when using CCM to manually overwrite or enter a sum/amount to be credited to the customer, could be at any of partial, delta or final settlement phase, with a fixed amount, if there were accruals applied?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to deactivate monitoring and alerting for inactiv...
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,
I'm a little bit surprised about the above answer.
Is a workmode "Planned Downtime" or "Maintenance" not de-activating the monitoring?
If I have a system that is not used anymore, then I go to Advanced System Monitoring configuration => Select the inactive or unused system and select "Do not assign a template".
In the FRUN LMDB, I change the Lifecycle status to "disused" and the system will not be available anymore in the FRUN-SSI.
Kind regards,
Jean-Paul

entry.title: Re: Opinion about ALM Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
I am a new CALM user with 3 months experience, having previously used Solution Manager ChaRM (Change Release Management).  Compared to ChaRM, the CALM user experience is improved.  We have had one large(ish) deployment to Production, and it went well notwithstanding 1 issue where we had a dependent transport in another release - but this was a user error, and not an error of the tool.  Had we run the analysis beforehand, this would have been discovered, and we could have addressed the issue earlier.

One thing to note, you need to be well sure of your desired Transport path before you begin using CALM to deploy transports.  After you have deployed transports, the path cannot be altered, or CALM gets "confused" and it can lead to issues.

CALM can be glitchy, which while annoying, can generally be solved by closing your session and/or logging out and logging back in. 

Overall, so far I have enjoyed the CALM tool.  I look forward to the improvements and additional functionality that SAP is planning to put out.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: SAP Utilities Roadmap 2025 Onwards
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,
I wanted to know if there is any roadmap / plan in ISU to come up with Direct APIs or any other way by with ISU Master Data(Technical and Business) could be created when called from external non sap system. for ex, via Odata / RFCs/ BAPIs if calls come from outside sap , ISU returns list of all Master Data(Technical/Business) back to non sap system with out any intermediate wrapper or system or package.

Thanks,
Amit

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content: I have added my vote 😀

entry.title: Re: how to change validity period
entry.content:
Hi,

Go to T code KL02 enter your Activity type and press enter, then go to the edit icon on the main menu and click on Analysis period then you can change the Valid from and valid to date .

entry.title: Re: Condition contract management conditions RES1 vs REA1
entry.content:
Hello Hadjolian,

Please familiarise yourself with Note 2481672 - Condition Contract Management - Useful Documents.

For basic knowledge please consider a training, e.g. SCM620 Pricing in SD
